title: senecio eightsii
intro: Senecio eightsii, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and anthelmintic, helping to remove parasites from the body. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Groundsel is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
